{{Expand}}

{{Infobox construct
| name = Creeping Death
| introduced = Dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|[[Creeping Death]] is a shadowy cloud with shining green eyes.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c17">''Dreadgod'', chapter 17</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Constructs]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
